title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: US Senate passes housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030
summary: The Senate voted 85-5 to pass a major housing affordability bill that includes a ban on the Federal Reserve making a central bank digital currency until 2030.

title: Wimbledon Investors Cash In With VIP Seats Costing Over $500,000
summary: A niche financial instrument that grants the holder some of the best seats at Wimbledon are now changing hands for more than $500,000.

title: Stocks Hit by Tech Selloff, Yen Near 40-Year Low: Markets Wrap
summary: Global stocks slumped as investors rotated out of some of this year’s high-performing technology shares while awaiting further developments in US-Iran peace talks.
